title: OG Christmas ☃️
description: 🎄✨ A vanilla-enhanced modpack focusing on content, optimization, fun, and a refinement of the core gameplay loop.
body:
![OG Christmas Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf7e6b819b5a5cc077f3e05460dc707f9279bfa.png)

### 🎄✨ A vanilla-enhanced modpack focusing on content, optimization, fun, and a refinement of the core gameplay loop.
# ⭐ Features
### 🚀 Performance-conscious!
Being built upon [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline), this modpack takes performance on a whole another level while retaining the same amount of detail.
### ✅ Vanilla feel? Check!
This modpack expands upon the core Vanilla experience, while sprinkling in a few *subtle yet appealing* effects, to make Minecraft feel much more pleasing to play.

But, this goes even further, even beyond the standard "Vanilla+" formula, with the addition of content mods **like Ad Astra, Farmer's Delight and others!**
### 🌐 Want to run it on a server? We got you!
We also include a bunch of optimization mods specifically dedicated for servers, so you can rest assured that your server will perform smoothly.
### 🪶 Lightweight
We aim to keep the Modpack relatively lightweight, stripping out mods which we deem unnecessary or which change very little in the game.

***NOTE:** This modpack was originally made for a friend group to play on their private SMP. Therefore, there is no guarantee that it's going to be updated for a while, if at all.*
